Privacy Policy

Introduction

At Contents Technologies, we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share your personal information when you use our app, and outlines your rights in relation to your personal data.

As part of providing the Contents Technologies platform and facilitating video monetization through YouTube Shorts, we collect and process personal data, including the use of cookies, as outlined in this Privacy Policy.

Contents Technologies adheres to all relevant data protection regulations, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), where applicable.

If you have any questions about this policy or your data, please contact us at: contact@contentstech.com

 

 

Privacy Policy for Contents Technologies

Effective Date: 2025-12-03

Data We Collect

At the moment, we do not collect any personal information other than the technical log data that is collected automatically (such as the requester’s IP and browser information).

How We Use Your Data

We analyze collected logs to enhance the functionality, security, and performance of this website.

Sharing Your Information

Contents Technologies currently does not share your data with third-party service providers. However, we may share your data if required by law or if necessary to protect the rights and safety of Contents Technologies and its users.

Data Security

We use industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption and secure servers.

Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We currently does not use cookies or similar technologies to track users.

Data Retention

We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law.

Third-Party Links and Services

Contents Technologies may link to external websites or services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third-party platforms. We recommend reviewing their privacy policies before interacting with them.

Contact info

This privacy policy is designed to ensure transparency in how we handle your personal information and to protect your rights as a user of this website.

For any questions about this Privacy Policy, or if you wish to exercise your rights, please contact us at:

Email: contact@contentstech.com
